title: notopleura araguensis
intro: Notopleura araguensis is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the Notopleura araguensis or Brazilian Notopleura. The plant has been traditionally used in Brazilian folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimalarial activities. The Notopleura araguensis plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating malaria, and alleviating respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Notopleura araguensis can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using them in tinctures, with the plant being used in traditional medicine in various parts of Brazil.
